ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Ön Büro Yönetimi Yazılımı
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Efficiently handles front office operations, reservations, housekeeping, folios, billing, online sales, identity reporting, and management analytics.

ResultSets.NAME_EN: Eptera Channel Management & Online Reservation Software
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Synchronizes availability, rates, and reservations with online channels in real time, supports stop sale automation, and enables direct bookings through the hotel’s website via the integrated online booking engine.

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb E-Uygulama  Yazılımı
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Eptera lets you manage e-Invoice e-Archive e-Delivery Note and e-Ledger processes in a compliant and streamlined way through your hotel system.

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Muhasebe  Yazılımı

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Stok  Yazılımı

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Pos  Yazılımı

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Sanal Pos Entegrasyonu Yazılımı
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: The guest's accommodation charges or additional in-room expenses are automatically applied to the folio through a swiftly and securely delivered payment link. To facilitate this module, integration with a virtual point of sale (POS) is essential.

ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Eptera Smart ID Reader & Check-in Pro is a mobile solution that scans guest IDs and passports using a phone or tablet camera and transfers the data directly into the PMS. It enables a faster and fully contactless check in flow for front desk teams. Unlimited scans are included.

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Misafir Mobil Uygulama ( Generic) Yazılımı
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Guest Generic Mobile Application is a ready to use guest mobile app with standard features. It is not published under a specific hotel name and it is not branded for a single property. It covers core functions like guest messaging, service requests, and basic reservation related flows.

ResultSets.NAME: ElektraWeb Misafir Mobil Uygulama ( Otele Özel) Yazılımı
ResultSets.NAME_EN: Hotel specific mobile app (published for the hotel)
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Hotel specific mobile app (published for the hotel) is prepared for one specific hotel and published under the hotel’s name. If preferred, it can also be published under the hotel’s own Google Play and Apple App Store developer accounts. On the guest side, the hotel identity is visible and the app works as a digital extension of the property.

ResultSets.NAME: Eptera Boutique
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION: Eptera Boutique, 50 odaya kadar olan küçük butik oteller için bulut tabanlı bir PMS’tir. Rezervasyon, check-in/check-out, faturalama, folyo yönetimi, QuickPOS ve dahili mini stok kontrolü içerir. İsteğe bağlı mini muhasebe modülü aylık +20 EUR karşılığında eklenebilir.
ResultSets.DESCRIPTION_EN: Eptera Boutique is a cloud-native PMS for small boutique hotels with up to 50 rooms, including reservations, channel manager, booking engine, check-in/check-out, invoicing, folio management, QuickPOS, and built-in mini stock control, with optional mini accounting available for an additional €20 per month.
